description.p: GoldenDict-ng is an advanced dictionary lookup program, supporting multiple dictionary formats and features.

ul.li: Update metainfo.xml after skip first 3 lines in changelog (#2897) - ([6cfb52f](https://github.com/xiaoyifang/goldendict-ng/commit/6cfb52fcf114f82f56e6c6aad32fa0af200fc0e3))
Use mainwindow as goldendict:// translation place (#2893) - ([1c6f00a](https://github.com/xiaoyifang/goldendict-ng/commit/1c6f00a83eb3e8e87cd7024d9983c7fa5aa3107d))
(ui)* Improve UI controls visibility and naming (#2892) - ([2c150b3](https://github.com/xiaoyifang/goldendict-ng/commit/2c150b3956a5e88cc288cc52c2cf4df124518cb6))
(dictinfo)* Add button to toggle full-text search index (#2860) - ([c3e6e23](https://github.com/xiaoyifang/goldendict-ng/commit/c3e6e23b199ff50b42223732078d0f5f3731e1c9))
Refactor .gddictname in st-lingoes theme to use flex layout (#2875) - ([0497159](https://github.com/xiaoyifang/goldendict-ng/commit/0497159a4957a7a510ef5c3540da7651caa7c35f))
Resolve Node.js 20 deprecation warnings and upgrade actions to Node.js 24 (#2874) - ([e33c22e](https://github.com/xiaoyifang/goldendict-ng/commit/e33c22ed81eaf29b5e50e59fa17f77308dc09efb))
Prevent dictionary file locking when modifying settings or reloading dictionaries (#2871) - ([f7664b2](https://github.com/xiaoyifang/goldendict-ng/commit/f7664b2927d3bfa85742ba797d82bd2ffbbdddb0))
Update welcome tag format in translation files (#2872) - ([aa17ee0](https://github.com/xiaoyifang/goldendict-ng/commit/aa17ee001f6abe0a7e1d3af151928d1e493ded9a))
(workflows)* Exclude chaos version tags in release (#2867) - ([1df4d78](https://github.com/xiaoyifang/goldendict-ng/commit/1df4d789e078b06aab8211be7355e6f2bd9279a0))
